query:
SELECT l.id, l.nome, l.senhorio, l.contactoSenhorio, g.id as gestor_id, u.name as gestor_nome
FROM lojas l
LEFT JOIN gestor_lojas gl ON l.id = gl.lojaId
LEFT JOIN gestores g ON gl.gestorId = g.id
LEFT JOIN users u ON g.userId = u.id
WHERE l.id IN (60001, 180019)
ORDER BY l.id;
